data.location: Near Eastern Way, Melksham, Wiltshire, UK (1.9 hectares of farmland, 1.8km from town centre; full address not specified)
data.event_date: Not specified (subject to planning approval by Wiltshire Council)
data.status: proposed; plans unveiled; subject to planning approval
data.short_description: Lidl has unveiled plans to relocate its existing Bath Road store in Melksham to a larger site near Eastern Way, proposing a new 2,184 sq m store with a 1,529 sq m sales floor, 132 parking spaces, and 384 roof-mounted solar panels. The existing Bath Road store would close as part of the move, which would create 10 additional jobs. The project requires approval from Wiltshire Council planners.

data.location: Bath Road, Melksham, Wiltshire, UK (full address not specified)
data.status: proposed closure as part of relocation plan
data.short_description: Lidl's existing 20-year-old Bath Road store in Melksham is proposed to close as part of plans to relocate to a new, larger site near Eastern Way. The closure is contingent on planning approval from Wiltshire Council.

data.short_description: Mr. Po' Boyz Burgers and Seafood soft-launched on April 24 at 2605 E. Lucas St. in Beaumont, TX, in a familiar north end Beaumont restaurant space with a Mardi Gras color scheme. A formal grand opening is scheduled for May 16.

data.location: 71 South Main St., Newtown, CT (zip not specified) — former Eggs & Co. space
data.short_description: jjStacks, a bar and grill offering over 100 wing varieties, burgers, and a sports bar atmosphere, has opened at 71 South Main St. in Newtown, CT in the former Eggs & Co. space. A ribbon-cutting ceremony is scheduled for 2 p.m. on May 18. The Newtown location marks the brand's first brick-and-mortar restaurant.

data.location: 5484 Lena Road, Bradenton, FL (zip not specified) — off State Road 70 near Interstate 75
data.status: opening soon; grand opening at 11 a.m. Monday
data.short_description: Saucy! by KFC is opening its first Manatee County location at 5484 Lena Road in Bradenton, FL on May 4 at 11 a.m., with giveaways and complimentary bites. The location introduces two new menu items: the Big Sammie and Saucy! x DRIPS by Pepsi drinks.

data.location: 660 Merril Road, Pittsfield, MA (zip not specified) — Stop & Shop Plaza
data.short_description: A new Jersey Mike's Subs location is planned for 660 Merril Road in Pittsfield, MA, in the Stop & Shop Plaza next to Pizza Hut, to be operated by Liotta Brothers LLC. No confirmed opening date has been announced; discovery was based on an Indeed.com job posting for a General Manager.

data.location: Address not specified — uptown/South End, Charlotte, NC, near Carson Station light rail
data.status: in the final stages of construction and inspections; opening in May
data.short_description: Market on Morehead is a full-service restaurant and bar opening in Charlotte, NC in May 2026, near the light rail's Carson Station, with seating for 200 inside and 150 outdoors. It features a 25-foot LED Jumbotron, a 40-seat bar, Rail Trail patio views, and is a sister spot to Market on Main in Columbia, SC.

data.short_description: Centara Hotels & Resorts has opened Centara Life Namba Hotel Osaka, its second property in Japan, in the heart of Osaka's Namba district. The hotel features 300 non-smoking rooms, a rooftop lounge (SORA), and a breakfast dining venue (DINING).

data.location: Airport Road, Mohali, India (full address not specified)
